what: Write each enriched entry to the vault directory with full frontmatter (title, category, tags, description, rules, required_knowledge) and register it in the database
why: Makes knowledge entries available for search and knowledge injection

error_handling.scenario: File already exists at destination path
error_handling.criteria: existsSync returns true for the target path

decisions.rationale: Overwriting existing vault knowledge could destroy user edits; skipping is safer
